passage_title: The future of the World's Language

sentences.sentence: Of the world's 6,500 living languages, around half are expected to the out by the end of this century, according to UNESCO.
sentences.translation: 在全世界6500种现存语言中，据联合国教科文组织估计，约有一半将在本世纪末消亡。

structure.text: by the end of this century

difficult_points: of the world's 6,500 living languages 修饰 half，说明是这6500种现存语言中的一半。
to the out 为原文表述，对应“to die out”（走向消亡）之意。
according to UNESCO 说明这一数据来源是联合国教科文组织。

sentences.sentence: Just 11 are spoken by more than half of the earth's population, so it is little wonder that those used by only a few are being left behind as we become a more homogenous, global society.
sentences.translation: 只有11种语言的使用者超过全球人口的一半，因此难怪那些只有少数人使用的语言，会随着我们的社会日益走向同质化、全球化而逐渐被淘汰。

structure.text: by more than half of the earth's population
that those used by only a few are being left behind
as we become a more homogenous, global society

difficult_points: so 在此引导结果，承接前一分句得出的结论。
it is little wonder that... 是形式主语句型，意为“难怪……”。
those used by only a few 中 those 指代语言，used by only a few 是过去分词短语作后置定语。
as 在此表示“随着”，说明社会走向同质化的伴随过程。

sentences.sentence: In short, 95 percent of the world's languages are spoken by only five percent of its population— a remarkable level of linguistic diversity stored in tiny pockets of speakers around the world.
sentences.translation: 简而言之，世界上95%的语言只由5%的人口使用——这是一种惊人的语言多样性，分散储存在世界各地为数不多的使用者群体中。

structure.text: by only five percent of its population
a remarkable level of linguistic diversity
stored in tiny pockets of speakers around the world

difficult_points: in short 承接上文，对前述现象作总结。
破折号后的名词短语是对前面整句现象的同位语概括，说明这体现出怎样的语言多样性。
stored in tiny pockets of speakers 是过去分词短语，修饰 diversity，比喻多样性“储存”在分散的小群体中。

sentences.sentence: Mark Turin, a university professor, has launched WOLP (World Oral Language Project) to prevent the language from the brink of extinction.
sentences.translation: 马克·图林（Mark Turin）是一位大学教授，他发起了世界口语项目（WOLP），旨在使这些语言免于灭绝的命运。

structure.text: to prevent the language from the brink of extinction

difficult_points: a university professor 是插入的同位语，补充说明 Mark Turin 的身份。
to prevent...from... 不定式表示发起项目的目的。
the language 泛指前文提及的这些濒危语言。

sentences.sentence: He is trying to encourage indigenous communities to collaborate with anthropologists around the world to record what he calls "oral literature" through video cameras, voice recorders and other multimedia tools by awarding grants from a £30,000 pot that the project has secured this year.
sentences.translation: 他正试图鼓励原住民社群与世界各地的人类学家合作，通过视频摄像机、录音设备和其他多媒体工具，记录他所称的“口头文学”；具体做法是从该项目今年获得的三万英镑资金中发放拨款。

structure.text: to collaborate with anthropologists around the world
to record what he calls "oral literature" through video cameras, voice recorders and other multimedia tools
by awarding grants from a £30,000 pot
that the project has secured this year

difficult_points: encourage sb to do sth 中 to collaborate 和 to record 是两层递进的不定式，分别说明鼓励的内容和进一步的目的。
what he calls "oral literature" 是宾语从句，作 record 的宾语，指他所称的“口头文学”。
that the project has secured this year 是定语从句，修饰 £30,000 pot，说明这笔资金是今年获得的。

sentences.sentence: The idea is to collate this literature in a digital archive that can be accessed on demand and will make the nuts and bolts of lost cultures readily available.
sentences.translation: 这一构想是要把这些口头文学汇集进一个数字档案库，人们可以随时查阅，它还能让那些已消逝文化的核心细节变得触手可及。

structure.text: to collate this literature in a digital archive
that can be accessed on demand
and will make the nuts and bolts of lost cultures readily available

difficult_points: the idea is to do sth 句型，不定式作表语说明这个构想的具体内容。
that 引导定语从句修饰 a digital archive，can be accessed 和 will make 是共享先行词 that 的并列谓语。
the nuts and bolts of 是习语，指“……的基本构成/核心细节”。

sentences.sentence: For many of these communities, the oral tradition is at the heart of their culture.
sentences.translation: 对于这些社群中的许多群体来说，口头传统是其文化的核心。

structure.text: at the heart of their culture

difficult_points: for many of these communities 限定了该论断的适用范围，并非所有社群。
at the heart of 是习语，表示“……的核心”。

sentences.sentence: The stories they tell are creative as well as communicative.
sentences.translation: 他们讲述的故事既富有创造性，也具有交流功能。
difficult_points: they tell 是省略了关系代词的定语从句，修饰 stories。
as well as 连接两个并列表语，表示“不仅……而且……”。

sentences.sentence: Unlike the languages with celebrated written traditions, such as Sanskrit, Hebrew and Ancient Greek, few indigenous communities have recorded their own languages or ever had them recorded until now.
sentences.translation: 与拥有著名书面传统的语言（如梵语、希伯来语和古希腊语）不同，很少有原住民社群曾记录过自己的语言，直到现在都是如此。

structure.text: Unlike the languages with celebrated written traditions
such as Sanskrit, Hebrew and Ancient Greek

difficult_points: unlike 引导介词短语作对比状语，将有书面传统的语言与本段主体（口头社群）作对比。
such as 列举 celebrated written traditions 的具体例子。
have recorded 与 had them recorded 并列，后者是“have + 宾语 + 过去分词”的使役结构，表示“让……被记录”。

sentences.sentence: The project suggested itself when Turin was teaching in Nepal.
sentences.translation: 这个项目的构想是在图林于尼泊尔教书期间自然产生的。

structure.text: when Turin was teaching in Nepal

difficult_points: suggested itself 意为“自然而然产生、浮现”，itself 强调这个想法是自发出现的，而非刻意设计。
when 引导时间状语从句，交代这一构想产生的背景。

sentences.sentence: He wanted to study for a PhD in endangered languages and, while discussing it with his professor at Leiden University in the Netherlands, was drawn to a map on his tutor's wall.
sentences.translation: 他想攻读濒危语言方向的博士学位，在与荷兰莱顿大学的导师讨论这一想法时，他的目光被导师墙上的一张地图吸引住了。

structure.text: to study for a PhD in endangered languages
was drawn to a map on his tutor's wall
while discussing it with his professor at Leiden University in the Netherlands

difficult_points: wanted to study... 和 was drawn to... 是 and 连接、共享主语 He 的两个并列谓语。
while discussing it with... 是插入的时间状语从句，it 指代前面的博士研究计划。
was drawn to 是被动结构，表示“被吸引到”，暗示这一发现带有偶然性。

sentences.sentence: The map was full of pins of a variety of colours which represented all the world's languages that were completely undocumented.
sentences.translation: 这张地图上插满了各种颜色的图钉，代表着世界上所有完全没有文字记录的语言。

structure.text: pins of a variety of colours
which represented all the world's languages

difficult_points: be full of 表示“布满、充满”。
which 引导定语从句修饰 pins，说明这些图钉代表了什么。
that were completely undocumented 是嵌套的定语从句，修饰 languages，两层定语从句层层限定。

sentences.sentence: At random, Turin chose a "pin" to document.
sentences.translation: 图林随手选中了一枚“图钉”，准备对它所代表的语言进行记录。
difficult_points: at random 表示“随机地”，呼应下文他承认选择具有偶然性。
"pin" 加引号，借指墙上地图上代表某种语言的图钉，喻指这门未知的语言。
to document 不定式表示挑选这枚图钉的目的。

sentences.sentence: It happened to belong to the Thangmi tribe, an indigenous community in the hills east of Kathmandu, the capital of Nepal.
sentences.translation: 结果这枚图钉恰好属于唐米族（Thangmi tribe）——一个位于尼泊尔首都加德满都以东山区的原住民社群。

structure.text: happened to belong to the Thangmi tribe
an indigenous community in the hills east of Kathmandu

difficult_points: happen to do sth 表示“碰巧、恰好做某事”，呼应前文选择的随机性。
两个同位语依次补充说明 the Thangmi tribe 和 Kathmandu 的具体身份。

sentences.sentence: "Many of the choices anthropologists and linguists who work on these traditional field-work projects are quite random," he admits.
sentences.translation: 他坦言：“人类学家和语言学家在这些传统实地调查项目中，很多时候的选择其实相当随意。”

structure.text: anthropologists and linguists who work on these traditional field-work projects
who work on these traditional field-work projects

difficult_points: anthropologists and linguists who work on these traditional field-work projects 是省略了关系代词和谓语动词（make）的定语从句，修饰 the choices。
who work on these traditional field-work projects 进一步修饰 anthropologists and linguists。
he admits 是引语后置的转述标签，he 指代图林。

sentences.sentence: Continuing his work with the Thangmi community in the 1990s, Turin began to record the language he was hearing, realising that not only was this language and its culture entirely undocumented, it was known to few outside the tiny community.
sentences.translation: 在20世纪90年代继续与唐米社群合作期间，图林开始记录他所听到的这门语言，并意识到，这门语言及其文化不仅完全没有文字记录，而且在这个小社群之外几乎无人知晓。

structure.text: Continuing his work with the Thangmi community in the 1990s
realising that not only was this language and its culture entirely undocumented, it was known to few outside the tiny community
not only was this language and its culture entirely undocumented
it was known to few outside the tiny community

difficult_points: Continuing his work... 是现在分词短语作时间状语，说明图林在继续其工作期间开始录音。
he was hearing 是省略关系代词的定语从句，修饰 the language。
not only was this language...undocumented 使用了倒装结构（not only 位于句首，助动词 was 提前），与后面的 it was known to few 隐含并列关系。

sentences.sentence: He set about trying to record their language and myth of origins.
sentences.translation: 他着手尝试记录他们的语言以及关于起源的神话传说。

structure.text: trying to record their language and myth of origins
to record their language and myth of origins

difficult_points: set about doing sth 表示“着手做某事”，about 后接动名词。
myth of origins 指关于本族起源的神话传说。

sentences.sentence: "I wrote 1,000 pages of grammar in English that nobody could use—but I realised that wasn't enough.
sentences.translation: “我用英文写了1000页的语法资料，但没人能看懂——不过我意识到，这样是不够的。
difficult_points: that nobody could use 是定语从句，修饰 grammar，说明这份语法资料存在的问题。
但 I realised that wasn't enough 中的 that 是指示代词，指代前面的1000页语法书，而非连接词。
直接引语从这句开始，只在段末才闭合引号。

sentences.sentence: It wasn't enough for me, it wasn't enough for them.
sentences.translation: 对我自己不够，对他们来说也不够。
difficult_points: 两个分句用逗号并列（无连接词），形成对照式的重复强调。
it 均指代前面提到的那份1000页语法资料。

sentences.sentence: It simply wasn't going to work as something for the community.
sentences.translation: 这份资料根本无法作为服务社群的成果发挥作用。
difficult_points: work as 表示“作为……起作用、发挥效果”。
it 依然指代那份语法资料。

sentences.sentence: So then I produced this trilingual word list in Thangmi, Nepali and English."
sentences.translation: 于是，我又编写了这份唐米语、尼泊尔语和英语三语对照的词表。”

structure.text: this trilingual word list in Thangmi, Nepali and English

difficult_points: so then 表示“于是”，承接上文说明后续做法。
trilingual word list 指用三种语言对照编写的词表。
引号在此句末闭合，标志着图林这段引语的结束。

sentences.sentence: In short, it was the first ever publication of that language.
sentences.translation: 简而言之，这是该语言有史以来的第一次出版物。

structure.text: the first ever publication of that language

difficult_points: in short 承接上文，对图林的做法作总结。
the first ever 强调“有史以来第一次”。
it 指代前文提到的三语词表。

sentences.sentence: That small dictionary is still sold in local schools for a modest 20 rupees, and used as part of a wider cultural regeneration process to educate children about their heritage and language.
sentences.translation: 那本小词典如今仍以20卢比的亲民价格在当地学校出售，并作为更广泛的文化复兴进程的一部分，用来教育孩子们了解自己的传统与语言。

structure.text: is still sold in local schools for a modest 20 rupees
and used as part of a wider cultural regeneration process
to educate children about their heritage and language

difficult_points: is...sold 与 (is) used 是并列的被动谓语，共享主语 that small dictionary，第二个 is 被省略。
as part of 表示“作为……的一部分”。
to educate 不定式表示这一文化复兴过程的目的。

sentences.sentence: The task is no small undertaking: Nepal itself is a country of massive ethnic and linguistic diversity, home to 100 languages from four different language families.
sentences.translation: 这项任务绝非易事：尼泊尔本身就是一个民族和语言极为多样化的国家，境内有来自四个不同语系的100种语言。

structure.text: Nepal itself is a country of massive ethnic and linguistic diversity
home to 100 languages from four different language families

difficult_points: no small undertaking 是双重否定，意为“绝非易事”。
冒号后的内容具体解释“任务艰巨”的原因。
home to... 是同位语短语，补充说明尼泊尔是100种语言的所在地。

sentences.sentence: What's more, even fewer ethnic Thangmi speak the Thangmi language.
sentences.translation: 更有甚者，能说唐米语的唐米族人反而更少。
difficult_points: what's more 表示“更有甚者”，引出比前文更严重的情况。
even fewer 中 even 强化比较，表示“数量更少”。

sentences.sentence: Many of the community members have taken to speaking Nepali, the national language taught in schools and spread through the media, and community elders are dying without passing on their knowledge.
sentences.translation: 许多社群成员已经习惯讲尼泊尔语——这门语言在学校教授、并通过媒体广泛传播；与此同时，社群里的长者相继离世，却未能把自己的知识传承下去。

structure.text: taught in schools and spread through the media

difficult_points: take to doing sth 表示“开始养成……的习惯”。
taught in schools and spread through the media 是并列的过去分词短语，修饰 the national language。
without passing on their knowledge 说明长者去世前未能传承知识的遗憾。

sentences.sentence: Despite Turin's enthusiasm for his subject, he is baffled by many linguists' refusal to engage in the issue he is working on.
sentences.translation: 尽管图林对自己的研究课题充满热情，但许多语言学家拒绝参与他所研究的问题，这让他感到困惑。

structure.text: Despite Turin's enthusiasm for his subject
is baffled by many linguists' refusal to engage in the issue

difficult_points: despite 引导让步状语，与后面“感到困惑”形成对比。
many linguists' refusal to engage in... 中 refusal 后接不定式，说明拒绝参与的具体内容。
he is working on 省略了关系代词 that/which，修饰 issue，介词 on 留在句末。

sentences.sentence: "Of the 6,500 languages spoken on Earth, many do not have written traditions and many of these spoken forms are endangered," he says.
sentences.translation: 他说：“在地球上现存的6500种语言中，许多没有书面传统，而且其中不少口语形式正濒临消失。”

structure.text: Of the 6,500 languages spoken on Earth
many do not have written traditions
and many of these spoken forms are endangered

difficult_points: Of the 6,500 languages spoken on Earth 前置，限定后面 many 的范围，即“在这6500种语言中”。
many 在此指代“许多语言”，避免与前面 languages 重复。
引语结束后 he says 是转述标签。

sentences.sentence: "There are more linguists in universities around the world than there are spoken languages—but most of them aren't working on this issue.
sentences.translation: “全世界大学里的语言学家人数，比现存的语言种类还要多——但他们中大多数人并没有从事这个问题的研究。

structure.text: There are more linguists in universities around the world
but most of them aren't working on this issue

difficult_points: there are more A than there are B 是比较句型，比较全球语言学家和现存语言种类的数量。
them 指代前面的 linguists。

sentences.sentence: To me it's amazing that in this day and age, we still have an entirely incomplete image of the world's linguistic diversity.
sentences.translation: 对我来说，令人惊讶的是，都到了这个时代，我们对世界语言多样性的认识竟然仍然极不完整。

structure.text: that in this day and age, we still have an entirely incomplete image of the world's linguistic diversity

difficult_points: it's amazing that... 中 it 是形式主语，真正的主语是 that 引导的从句。
in this day and age 是习语，意为“在当今时代”。
an entirely incomplete image of 强调对这一现象的认识极不完整。

sentences.sentence: People do PhDs on the apostrophe in French, yet we still don't know how many languages are spoken."
sentences.translation: 人们竟然会去研究法语中撇号的用法来攻读博士学位，可我们却依然不知道世界上究竟有多少种语言在被使用。”

structure.text: do PhDs on the apostrophe in French

difficult_points: do a PhD on sth 表示“以……为题攻读博士学位”。
yet 在此表转折，凸显“研究细枝末节却不了解语言总数”的荒谬对比。
how many languages are spoken 是宾语从句，作 know 的宾语。

expressions.meaning_zh: 攻读以……为题的博士学位

sentences.sentence: "When a language becomes endangered, so too does a cultural world view.
sentences.translation: “当一门语言濒临消亡时，与之相伴的一种文化世界观也会同样面临消失。

structure.text: so too does a cultural world view

difficult_points: so too does a cultural world view 是倒装句，相当于 a cultural world view becomes endangered too，强调“……也是如此”。
endangered 在此比喻文化世界观也如濒危语言一样面临消失的风险。

sentences.sentence: We want to engage with indigenous people to document their myths and folklore, which can be harder to find funding for if you are based outside Western universities."
sentences.translation: 我们希望与原住民接触，记录他们的神话与民间传说；但如果你不是身处西方高校体系之内，为这类工作寻找资金支持往往会更加困难。”

structure.text: to document their myths and folklore
which can be harder to find funding for
if you are based outside Western universities

difficult_points: to engage 和 to document 分别表示“想要做的事”和这样做的目的，二者并列。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，指代前面“记录神话与民间传说”这件事本身，而非某个具体名词。
harder to find funding for 中 for 是后置介词，其宾语正是被修饰的先行词。

sentences.sentence: Yet, despite the struggles facing initiatives such as the World Oral Literature Project, there are historical examples that point to the possibility that language restoration is no mere academic pipe dream.
sentences.translation: 然而，尽管像世界口头文学项目这样的倡议面临重重困难，但历史上确有先例表明，语言复兴绝非纯属学术上的空想。

structure.text: despite the struggles facing initiatives such as the World Oral Literature Project
facing initiatives such as the World Oral Literature Project
that language restoration is no mere academic pipe dream

difficult_points: despite the struggles facing initiatives such as... 中 facing 是现在分词作后置定语，修饰 struggles。
that point to... 引导定语从句，修饰 examples。
the possibility that language restoration is no mere academic pipe dream 中 that 引导同位语从句，说明 possibility 的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: The revival of a modern form of Hebrew in the 19th century is often cited as one of the best proofs that languages long dead, belonging to small communities, can be resurrected and embraced by a large number of people.
sentences.translation: 19世纪现代希伯来语的复兴常被引用为最有力的证据之一，证明那些早已消亡、原本仅属于小群体的语言，依然可以复活并被大批人重新使用。

structure.text: The revival of a modern form of Hebrew in the 19th century
that languages long dead, belonging to small communities, can be resurrected and embraced by a large number of people

difficult_points: be cited as 表示“被引用作为……的例证”。
that 引导同位语从句，说明 proofs 的具体内容。
long dead 和 belonging to small communities 都是修饰 languages 的后置成分，分别是形容词短语和分词短语。

expressions.meaning_zh: 被引用为；被视为……的例证

sentences.sentence: By the 20th century, Hebrew was well on its way to becoming the main language of the Jewish population of both Ottoman and British Palestine.
sentences.translation: 到20世纪，希伯来语已经在稳步发展，逐渐成为鄂图曼统治时期和英国托管时期巴勒斯坦地区犹太人口的主要语言。

structure.text: was well on its way to becoming the main language
of the Jewish population of both Ottoman and British Palestine

difficult_points: be on one's way to doing sth 表示“正朝着……方向发展、迈进”。
both Ottoman and British Palestine 指同一地区在鄂图曼与英国先后统治下的两个历史时期。

expressions.text: be on one's way to doing

sentences.sentence: It is now spoken by more than seven million people in Israel.
sentences.translation: 如今，希伯来语已被以色列超过七百万人使用。

structure.text: by more than seven million people in Israel

difficult_points: it 指代希伯来语 Hebrew。
more than seven million 说明如今使用人数之多，与此前“早已消亡”形成对比。

sentences.sentence: Yet, despite the difficulties these communities face in saving their languages, Dr Turin believes that the fate of the world's endangered languages is not sealed, and globalisation is not necessarily the nefarious perpetrator of evil it is often presented to be.
sentences.translation: 然而，尽管这些社群在保护自身语言方面仍面临重重困难，图林博士仍然认为，世界上濒危语言的命运并未被彻底注定，全球化也未必如人们常常描绘的那样，是十恶不赦的罪魁祸首。

structure.text: despite the difficulties these communities face in saving their languages
that the fate of the world's endangered languages is not sealed
and globalisation is not necessarily the nefarious perpetrator of evil
it is often presented to be

difficult_points: these communities face 省略了关系代词，修饰 difficulties。
believes 后接由 that 引导、并由 and 连接的两个并列宾语从句。
the fate...is not sealed 中 sealed 比喻“命运已经注定、无法挽回”，not sealed 即“尚未注定”。
it is often presented to be 是省略了关系代词的定语从句，修饰 the nefarious perpetrator of evil，it 指代 globalisation。

sentences.sentence: "I call it the globalisation paradox: on the one hand globalisation and rapid socio-economic change are the things that are eroding and challenging diversity.
sentences.translation: “我把这称为全球化悖论：一方面，全球化和快速的社会经济变迁，正在侵蚀、挑战着语言多样性。

structure.text: on the one hand globalisation and rapid socio-economic change are the things
that are eroding and challenging diversity

difficult_points: call sth sth 是“称……为……”的结构，it 指代下文将阐述的现象。
on the one hand...（呼应下一句 But on the other）构成对照结构。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 the things，eroding 和 challenging 是并列的现在分词作谓语。

expressions.text: on the one hand...on the other (hand)

sentences.sentence: But on the other, globalisation is providing us with new and very exciting tools and facilities to get to places to document those things that globalisation is eroding.
sentences.translation: 但另一方面，全球化也在为我们提供令人振奋的新工具和新设施，让我们得以深入各地，记录下那些正被全球化本身侵蚀的事物。

structure.text: is providing us with new and very exciting tools and facilities

difficult_points: on the other 承接上句 on the one hand，等于 on the other hand。
provide sb with sth 表示“为某人提供某物”。
to get to places 和 to document 两个不定式层层递进，说明工具和设施的具体用途；that globalisation is eroding 与前文“eroding diversity”呼应，形成悖论。

sentences.sentence: Also, the communities at the coal-face of change are excited by what globalisation has to offer."
sentences.translation: 此外，那些身处变革最前线的社群，也对全球化所能带来的机遇感到兴奋。”

structure.text: the communities at the coal-face of change

difficult_points: at the coal-face of 原指“矿井采煤作业面”，比喻“处于变革最前沿、第一线”。
what globalisation has to offer 是宾语从句，作介词 by 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: In the meantime, the race is on to collect and protect as many of the languages as possible, so that the Rai Shaman in eastern Nepal and those in the generations that follow him can continue their traditions and have a sense of identity.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，抢救和保护尽可能多语言的竞赛已经打响，为的是让尼泊尔东部的莱伊萨满以及他之后世世代代的人，能够延续自己的传统，保有身份认同感。

structure.text: to collect and protect as many of the languages as possible
so that the Rai Shaman in eastern Nepal and those in the generations that follow him can continue their traditions and have a sense of identity

difficult_points: the race is on 是习语，表示“竞赛、较量已经开始”。
as many...as possible 表示“尽可能多的……”。
so that 引导目的状语从句，can continue 和 have 是并列谓语；that follow him 是定语从句，修饰 the generations。

sentences.sentence: And it certainly is a race: Turin knows his project's limits and believes it inevitable that a large number of those languages will disappear.
sentences.translation: 而这的确是一场竞赛：图林深知自己项目的局限，也相信有相当数量的语言终将不可避免地消亡。

structure.text: And it certainly is a race
and believes it inevitable that a large number of those languages will disappear
it inevitable that a large number of those languages will disappear

difficult_points: 冒号后的内容具体解释“这确实是一场竞赛”的原因。
believes it inevitable that... 中 it 是形式宾语，inevitable 是宾语补足语，that 从句才是真正的宾语。

sentences.sentence: "We have to be wholly realistic.
sentences.translation: “我们必须完全正视现实。
difficult_points: have to be wholly realistic 强调必须完全正视现实，不抱幻想。
此句是图林直接引语的开头，引号在段末才闭合。

sentences.sentence: A project like ours is in no position, and was not designed, to keep languages alive.
sentences.translation: 像我们这样的项目，既没有能力，最初的设计目的也不是要让这些语言存续下去。
difficult_points: be in no position to do sth 表示“没有资格、没有能力做某事”。
to keep languages alive 是不定式，同时作 is in no position 和 was not designed 两个并列谓语共享的补足语。

expressions.text: be in no position to do

sentences.sentence: The only people who can help languages survive are the people in those communities themselves.
sentences.translation: 唯一能够真正帮助这些语言存续下去的，只有那些社群自己的人。

structure.text: the people in those communities themselves

difficult_points: who 引导定语从句，修饰 the only people。
themselves 强调是这些社群自身，而非外部机构。

sentences.sentence: They need to be reminded that it's good to speak their own language and I think we can help them do that—becoming modern doesn't mean you have to lose your language."
sentences.translation: 他们需要被提醒，讲自己的母语是一件好事，而我认为我们能帮他们做到这一点——变得现代化，并不意味着必须放弃自己的语言。”

structure.text: that it's good to speak their own language
we can help them do that
becoming modern doesn't mean you have to lose your language
you have to lose your language

difficult_points: need to be reminded that... 是被动语态，说明这些社群需要被提醒的内容。
help them do that 中 that 指代前面“讲自己的语言”这件事。
破折号后的句子是对前面观点的补充说明：“变得现代化”与“保留自己的语言”并不矛盾。
